# services.nix-store-gcs-proxy

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.nix-store-gcs-proxy`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.nix-store-gcs-proxy` | `attribute set of (submodule)` | An attribute set describing an HTTP to GCS proxy that allows us to use GCS bucket via HTTP protocol. |
| `services.nix-store-gcs-proxy.<name>.address` | `string` | The address of the proxy. |
| `services.nix-store-gcs-proxy.<name>.bucketName` | `string` | Name of Google storage bucket |
| `services.nix-store-gcs-proxy.<name>.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable proxy for this bucket |
